review_title: Can't Imagine Managing My Workplace's Database Without it!
author: Shelby P.
pros: I have been using phpMyAdmin for over five years, and it has been a fantastic experience. Once you learn how to use the software, you truly appreciate the many features it offers for managing and organizing databases. I use phpMyAdmin for both customer service and junior developer work, and it has always been reliable. I have never experienced any data loss, and it’s easy to restore records that clients have accidentally deleted. Navigating the database with phpMyAdmin is straightforward, thanks to its intuitive interface. The software offers numerous ways to filter and search for specific data, making it easy to locate exactly what you need. Additionally, creating backups is simple, ensuring that if anything goes wrong, you can quickly restore any lost or altered data. phpMyAdmin also supports a variety of database management tasks such as importing and exporting data in multiple formats (including CSV, SQL, and XML), managing user privileges, running SQL queries, and designing tables. The best part is that phpMyAdmin is free. It's incredible that such a feature-rich and useful piece of software is available at no cost, making it accessible to everyone from individuals to professionals.
cons: phpMyAdmin is less user-friendly compared to some other software, and it does require a bit of time to learn how to navigate and utilize its features effectively. If you are familiar with programming and are quick to learn new software, this learning curve won’t be a big issue. However, for those with limited experience with older and less streamlined software, it may be somewhat challenging to get started. Given that phpMyAdmin is free, the customer service response time is slower compared to paid software. Although there is in-depth documentation and many forums available to find answers, it may still be a bit of a struggle for none tech savvy users.
author_profession: Customer Service Representative and Junior Developer

review_title: Easy databes management with phpMyAdmin
author: Yusuf T.
pros: I love how we can create database and use sql, without coding. -I can create databases very fast and well. -Import and Export options works really good so we can use databases at other platforms. -Integration is really easy.
cons: I think phpMyAdmin have a weak security, they need to improve it. Interface is so complicated for who is new.

review_title: Legend MySQL Database Manager
description: It manages databases well enough, with a learning curve to overcome first. There are features I am only beginning to feel comfortable with, but I guess database management is a skill.
author: Mando C.
pros: I use it for a variety of database management tasks, like adding/removing foreign keys, creating, retrieving, updating and deleting (CRUD) data. It has so many features that I am yet to use, but has catered to my needs so far, and my needs are demanding.
cons: The user interface could be better. It's too basic. The database is slower than some of its competition, and I don't like the fact that it has to reload every time I select a table. I suppose that's the reason it's slow when retrieving data for applications especially. its not user friendly for newbies, especially specialized features like foreign key management, table editing etc. It's a powerful tool that is under-used due to not-so-easily-locatable features, especially for a novice.

review_title: phpMyAdmin: A Universal Web GUI for MySQL database management
description: phpMyAdmin is a universal Web GUI for accessing and managing the MySQL database objects and data dictionary.
author: Wassim I.
pros: I used phyMyAdmin for managing the MySQL database and it was the main interface for sending my DDL and DML SQL statements to MySQL. The web interface is very simple for managing the different aspects of storage components on MySQL from Tables, Views, Triggers, Procedures, etc. Accessing the database user controls and permissions is very simplistic in phpMyAdmin. The GUI streamlines the user access roles and breaks it down to the individual privilege levels on the Table, Database, and Server levels. Moreover it is very easy to manage users from addition, deletion, and modification. Data migration in phpMyAdmin is governed by a simple database export/import mechanism that stores the database schema and data into a text file for a simple data migration procedure. Again creating and updating the database schema and data dictionary objects is fully accessible from phpMyAdmin. This makes the Web interface a universal tool for managing the different aspects of MySQL database management
cons: My only hardship when using phpMyAdmin is the slow performance especially when Inserting and updating records into the database. This wasn't a database issue as the insert and update statements were executing in milliseconds on the database level but the GUI is taking a lot of time to realize the updates.

review_title: Our only choice for database management
description: We actively use it in many areas such as database management, table or field association, export and import, and SQL word tests.
author: emin Z.
pros: Generally; Easy to install, use and interface. Maybe we are used to it because we have been using it for many years, but it is still easy. export and import work smoothly (except for file limits). We open Phpmyadmin every day without exception. It is always at our fingertips. We use integration with Apache or Xampp. we use xampp integration to start and stop.
cons: Import data limits can sometimes disrupt our work. but we can edit it from the "ini" file. sometimes we don't have access to the "ini" file and need to use load_data_infile. In this case, we need ssh access. On the table creation screen via the interface, the TAB key does not work properly on the screen where the table name, type, length... is written. The tab key navigates all fields and it is necessary to press the tab key 10-15 times to go down to the bottom line. It would be better if "ini" file customizations could be made from the interface

review_title: Review PHPMYADMIN
description: I use PHPMYADMIN all the time for my web projects and it's been a great help ever since.
author: Tychique Le Saint B.
pros: Platform security is far more advanced. Excellent database structuring
cons: Updates sometimes remove functionality from previous updates. So you should stay up to date all the time.

review_title: Must-have tool for mySql management
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This tool has all you need to manage your MySQL databases. Installation is very simple, it also comes bundled in almost every hosting provider. You can set permissions and optimize your tables directly from the web interface. Data import and export are also very useful and reliable. I can't think of any ordinary maintenance task you can't do using phpMyAdmin.
cons: If you are dealing with import and export of data using different collations you have to be careful while using the UI, it might be a bit confusing and phpMyAdmin will not auto-select the correct option for you. A better UI to visualize user permissions would also be very useful.

review_title: The best app to manage MySQL databases
description: Since I discovered PhpMyAdmin when I was a student, I have been using it, at first to practice creating databases, tables, users, roles, permissions, relationships, triggers and all the potential it offers. In my working days it has been a key tool, since managing general purpose websites, blogs or ecommerce based on Prestashop, it has been the basis of the company's data.Being so widespread there is a lot of support available and when I have had a problem I have been able to solve it thanks to the community and the people who contribute to this software.
author: Manuel Ángel G.
pros: If we seek to manage MySQL-type databases, it is one of the most powerful options on the market, it is integrated into the most used packages in web development, so by default the learning curve goes down a lot, because when installing software like Xampp , we have a MySQL database manager without much effort. I have used it on many occasions, from simple tasks such as exporting or importing databases, to drawing diagrams of tables and their relationships. In all my websites it is managed with PhpMyAdmin and it is scalable and secure, in fact I do not know of any other similar software because I have not needed to use anything else, with PhpMyAdmin it is enough for my work.
cons: I am so used to this software that, to ask, I would like it to have more support for other types of databases than MySQL, because it would be a success, at least personally, because it is very easy to use and configure.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: phpMyAdmin is the best web development technology for developing websites
description: I love it with all my heart. As proof, I am running my website on PHP CMS; wordpress.com. I have heard a phenomenal experience using PHP. It is the mostly used technology for website development.
author: Marenyane M.
pros: I like the fact that it is free I also like the fact that it is easy to use It is the mostly used framework across the world for web development I like the fact that it is easy to populate databases for my web applications It provides security for systems developed using PHP It has a lot of supporting material
cons: there is nothing I don't like about PHP. All its functionality resonates well with me. I use it more often while building web applications

review_title: phpMyAdmin is a top-notch technology for website development
description: Very helpful and easy to use
author: Darini M.
pros: Advanced features, user-friendly interface and great accessibility. PhpMyAdmin makes managing databases easier for me. Additionally, it is free and supported by the community, making it a wise choice for any web development project that requires efficient and convenient database management.
cons: While the user interface of PhpMyAdmin is designed to be easy to use, managing more complex databases can still be a challenge for users who are less experienced.

review_title: phpMyAdmin molte funzioni ma molto complesso
description: La mia esperienza complessiva con phpMyAdmin e neutra, ci sono alternative differenti da utilizzare per creare un database
author: giorgia B.
pros: Mi è piaciuto molto la facilità di distribuzione del prodotto molto facile l'installazione nel propio sito web, mi ha aiutata moltissimo nella creazione di nuovi utenti, phpMyAdmin pesa pochi MB ma molto potente
cons: Mi è piaciuto di meno di phpMyAdmin che risulta molto complesso per i meno esperti, non sono riuscita a trovare phpMyAdmin nell'hosting che ho acquistato direttamente con integrazione tramite plugin
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amministrazione db senza competenze tecniche particolari
description: La caratteristica principale è sicuramente la facilità d'utilizzo. Inoltre, essendo phpMyAdmin un applicazione web è nativamente centralizzata e può permettere l'accesso, tramite apposita autenticazione, anche a più persone nel caso ce ne sia bisogno.
author: Stefano R.
pros: Si possono creare, modificare e gestire tabelle su un database MySql in maniera semplice ed intuitiva tramite la comoda interfaccia web del prodotto. E' possibile, inoltre, effettuare operazioni tecniche sul database, che normalmente richiederebbero più tempo e più competenza, con la sola capacità di saper navigare su un sito. Serve solo avere le idee chiare di quello che si vuole andare fare (che nome dare alla tabella, che campi metterci, che dati inseririci, etc. etc.).
cons: La procedura di installazione spesso si rivela essere complicata se si vuole installare phpMyAdmin separatamente da MySql. Magari non per colpa del prototto in sè ma dell'ambiente su cui lo si va ad installare (Linux, Windows, Webserver, Firewall). Infatti, a volte, è preferibile e più pratico ricorrere a soluzioni, quali EasyPhp, che includono sia il database MySql sia phpMyAdmin già nativamente configurati assieme.

review_title: PhpMyAdmin un gestionnaire de base de données en locale
description: C'est un excellent outil qi vous permet de faire la gestion de vos données, j'ai surtout le faites de pour créer multi utilisateurs
author: Zie C.
pros: PhpMyAdmin est un gestionnaire de base de données en locale, qui vous permet de créer et gérer vos bases de données
cons: Il est limité en terme de type de données

review_title: Users can create, modify, and delete databases using phpMyAdmin's user-friendly UI, among.
description: phpMyAdmin is an effective utility for administering MySQL databases via a web interface overall. It allows numerous user profiles and rights, has an intuitive user interface, and is well supported by the community. However,
author: Rajdeepsinh D.
pros: For the purpose of assuring data protection and management, phpMyAdmin allows numerous user accounts and permissions. Along with handling passwords and user privileges, the tool offers a number of other tools for administering MySQL users.
cons: noted difficulties with the functionality and security of it. Organizations managing sensitive data may be concerned about some security flaws that have been revealed in the past.

review_title: The best database management programme for MySQL and MariaDB is PhpMyAdmin.
description: To manage database modifications or manually retrieve data from our databases, I utilise phpMyAdmin. We can update website material more quickly by using phpMyAdmin. We have full access to all of the data in the database. It has helped me identify and resolve operational issues brought on by plugins and other third-party applications that were linked to our databases.
author: Madhusudan S.
pros: Data table, user registration, Excel compatibility, bug patches, and server-side installation per package.Internal safety and unrestricted code.Alter tables on the running server.
cons: Nothing, as it features a user-friendly interface and makes storing files and our site database quick and uncomplicated.When I have very long tables, phpMyAdmin is slow to respond; the hosting becomes sluggish.

review_title: Open Source SQL Database Panel
description: I used phpMyAdmin more than 5 years, to build website and it's database platform. phpMyAdmin is helpful platform to use and organize your database. It is easy to implement phpMyAdmin.
author: Anil C.
pros: phpMyAdmin is obviously one of the greatest platform for all developers and marketers, you can work for in a smooth way and it is really helpful for developers. Moreover, it is open source and you can use it whenever you want.
cons: phpMyAdmin has old dashboard and features, the open source library should be developed more.

review_title: La meilleure UI pour MySQL
author: Florian B.
pros: L'interface graphique est vraiment une des meilleures du marché : claire, simple, facile d'utilisation. La visualisation et la gestion des bases de données devient une très bonne expérience
cons: L'absence d'historique des requête SQL jouées est particulièrement irritant

review_title: Simple MySQL Database Manager
author: Chris W.
pros: It is very easy to set up and has a simple remote GUI to manage my database.
cons: It has a old look and feel for the design of the GUI.

review_title: It’s amazing and it’s free
description: I use PhPMyAdmin for throwing together simple or complex database designs either for testing or in love environments. It’s scalable and does everything I need.

pros: I absolutely love PhPMyAdmin, it’s so easy to install, use and customise anybody with basic computer skills could do it. I can have a fully functional database with millions of table and queries without it costing a single penny.
cons: Nothing, I love this software, it does everything a paid for alternative does.

review_title: Database management for everybody
description: Used in the office to have data centralized on a server
author: Marco G.
pros: It is used as a simple web application and allows you to manage tables and data in an easy and intuitive way. Protections are used on the database and on the application (both of which must be configured) to guarantee security.
cons: The installation procedure is not very easy for non-industry users

cons: Pour mon utilisation (lecture du contenu et opérations courantes pour un site web), je n'ai pas rencontré de difficulté dans l'utilisation du logiciel.
